Home / Alternatives to HubSpot CRM / HubSpot CRM vs EspoCRM

HubSpot CRM vs EspoCRM

A side-by-side look at HubSpot CRM (the paid SaaS) and EspoCRM (the open source alternative). Use this page to decide if the switch fits your team and workflow.

HubSpot CRM EspoCRM
Tagline Marketing, sales, and service in one platform. Fast, lightweight open source CRM.
License Proprietary SaaS AGPL-3.0
Pricing Free tier; Starter Suite from $15/seat/month. Free to self-host · optional paid hosted plan
Self-host option No Yes — difficulty 2/5
Hosted cloud available Yes (only option) Yes
Desktop apps Varies by product Web only
Mobile apps Official apps typically available iOS, Android
Ad slot — between tables

Best for

Fast, lean CRM for SMBs who want the basics done well.

EspoCRM strengths

  • Snappy UI and modern feel.
  • Workflow and reporting included in community edition.
  • Docker deploy works well.

EspoCRM weaknesses

  • Smaller extension ecosystem than SuiteCRM.
  • Some advanced modules are paid extensions.
  • Smaller partner network.

What's the catch with HubSpot CRM?

  • Upsell pressure across tiers.
  • Hub add-ons stack up the bill.
  • Not self-hostable.

Still unsure?

Check the full list of alternatives to HubSpot CRM: see HubSpot CRM alternatives, or learn more about EspoCRM on its project page.

Other comparisons

HubSpot CRM vs SuiteCRM

Enterprise features without HubSpot's pricing ramp.

Marketing-heavy teams that want automation plus lead nurture.
